figmaApiFileId.description: The file ID for the Figma file to pull icons from

changelogFile.description: The CHANGELOG.md file to read and write overview of changes to

manifestFile.description: The manifest.json file to track icon syncs.

generatedDirectory.description: The directory to output generated files.

generatedFontName.description: The font family name to use in generated fonts.

generatedFontFormats.description: Formats of font files to generate.

generatedFontFormat.description: Format of the font file to generate.

generatedFontDirectory.description: Directory to output generated font to.

generatedCssDirectory.description: Generate a companion CSS file which references the generated font file.

generatedCssFileName.description: The basename of the generated companion CSS file.

hashed.description: If the generated font file name should include a hash.
